payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

payload.text: SELECT Category."Category" AS "Category", "Sales Amount" AS "revenue", (SalesAmount."Sales Amount" / SUM("Sales Amount")) * 100 AS "revenue_share_pct", "Order Quantity" AS "units_sold", "Total Product Cost" AS "gross_profit", ("Total Product Cost" / "Sales Amount") * 100 AS "gross_margin_pct" FROM "Product" JOIN "Sales" ON "Product"."ProductKey" = "Sales"."ProductKey" GROUP BY Category."Category", "Order Quantity", "Total Product Cost", Category."Category" ORDER BY "Sales Amount" DESC

Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT "Product", "Category", "Subcategory", "Extended Amount" AS "revenue", "Order Quantity" AS "units_sold", "Total Product Cost" AS "gross_profit", ((("Extended Amount" - "Total Product Cost") / "Extended Amount") * 100) AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" GROUP BY "Product", "Category", "Subcategory" ORDER BY "Extended Amount" DESC LIMIT 10

payload.text: SELECT Sales_Territory."Group", Country."Country", Region."Region", Date."Fiscal Year", SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") AS "Revenue", SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS "Units Sold" FROM Sales JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Country ON Sales."CustomerKey" = Country."CustomerKey" JOIN Region ON Country."Country" = Region."Country" JOIN Date ON Sales."OrderDateKey" = Date."DateKey" GROUP BY Sales_Territory."Group", Country."Country", Region."Region", Date."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY Sales_Territory."Group", Country."Country", Region."Region", Date."Fiscal Year"

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query
Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.

payload.text: SELECT "Subcategory", COUNT("Order Quantity") AS "order_lines", SUM("Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM("Sales Amount") / SUM("Order Quantity") AS "revenue_per_unit", AVG("List Price") AS "avg_list_price", SUM("Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "Subcategory" ORDER BY "ResellerKey" DESC

  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

questionText: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
questionLabel: [Q24][hard] Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.

payload.text: SELECT 'Sales_Territory' AS Channel, 'Category' AS Category, SUM('SalesAmount') AS revenue, SUM('SalesAmount') / SUM('SalesAmount') OVER () AS channel_revenue_share_pct, SUM('SalesAmount') / SUM('SalesAmount') OVER (PARTITION BY 'Sales_TerritoryKey') AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT 'SalesOrderLineKey') AS orders, SUM('TotalProductCost') AS gross_profit FROM Sales ORDER BY 'Sales_TerritoryKey' ASC, 'SalesAmount' DESC, 'Category' ASC

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"
